prompt: Create a moody cinematic close-up portrait in a dim teenage bedroom at night, inspired by the Euphoria HBO aesthetic. A young woman with medium-brown skin and messy dark curly hair tied loosely up sits centered in the frame, leaning forward in a dark oversized T-shirt, shoulders visible, with her face intentionally obscured by a large opaque dark brown square censor block placed over the central face area from forehead to chin. Use shallow depth of field, soft 35mm film grain, warm amber practical lamp light on the right side of the room and cool blue moonlight from a window on the left, creating a dramatic orange-and-blue color contrast. The background is softly blurred: bed or rumpled bedding on the left, a glowing bedside lamp and indistinct bedroom objects on the right, dark walls, intimate late-night atmosphere. Horizontal 16:9 composition, realistic live-action still, low-key lighting, emotional and melancholic mood, no text, no watermark.
